searxng-mcp.description: SearXNG metasearch engine bridge. Searches news, tech articles, arxiv, github via local SearXNG instance.
capabilities: search — search SearXNG with query, category, language, time_range
search_and_fetch — search + fetch full page content

infrastructure.cache: Dragonfly/Redis cache for search results (Docker, port 6381)

redis-memory-mcp.description: Persistent cross-session memory with semantic search + KV store for storing news summaries.
capabilities: mem_save — save article summary with vector embedding
mem_search — find articles by meaning (cosine similarity)
redis-memory-mcp.setup: Install redis-memory plugin separately or run start.sh from repo
